## this project is a playground to build and develop my knowledge with react and its internals and hooks

tech stack: React, Typescript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, React Router Dom, React Query, Zustand, React Hook Form, Zod, Axios, ESLint, Prettier, Husky, Lint Staged, Commitlint, Conventional Commits, Vitest, React Testing Library, Storybook, MSW, Docker, GitHub Actions, Codecov, Sentry

## above all tools i might use to code and test the things with application

features:

- [x] Create an application with Vite and React
- [x] Set up TypeScript for type safety
- [x] Integrate Tailwind CSS for styling
- [x] Implement routing with React Router Dom
- [x] Manage server state with React Query
- [x] Use Zustand for global state management
- [x] Handle forms with React Hook Form and validate with Zod
- [x] Need the routes for the application as much as we have hooks and features to implement
- [x] Set up Axios for API calls
- [x] Configure ESLint and Prettier for code quality and formatting
- [x] Set up Husky and Lint Staged for pre-commit checks
- [x] Use Commitlint and Conventional Commits for commit message standards
- [x] Write unit tests with Vitest and React Testing Library
- [x] Create Storybook stories for UI components
- [x] Mock API calls with react-testing-library and MSW
- [x] Create some agents to automate some tasks and processes in the development workflow
- [x] I want agents for pre commit and post commit
- [x] I want an agent to help me with writing commit messages based on the changes I made in the code
- [x] I want an agent to help me with writing tests for the code I wrote
- [x] I want an agent to help me with writing stories for the components I created
- [x] I want an agent to help me with writing documentation for the features I implemented
- [x] I want an agent to help me with writing code for the features I planned
- [x] I want an agent to help me with refactoring the code I wrote
- [x] I want an agent to help me with optimizing the performance of the code I wrote
- [x] I want an agent to help me with finding and fixing bugs in the code I wrote
- [x] I want an agent to help me with reviewing the code I wrote and giving me feedback on it
- [x] I want an agent to help me with learning new concepts and technologies related to React and its ecosystem
- [x] I want an agent to help me with finding resources and tutorials for learning new concepts and technologies related to React and its ecosystem
- [x] I want an agent to help me with keeping track of my learning progress and goals related to React and its ecosystem
